user_token.description: SonarCloud user token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <user_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: SonarCloud API base URL override for tests or proxies.

organization.description: SonarCloud organization key; sent as the 'organization' query parameter on every request when set.

component_keys.description: Comma-separated SonarCloud component keys. Sent as 'componentKeys' on issues/quality-gates/measures streams; only the first key is sent as 'component' on the components stream.

start_date.description: Lower bound sent as the 'createdAfter' query parameter (issues search).

end_date.description: Upper bound sent as the 'createdBefore' query parameter (issues search).

page_size.description: Records per page (1-500), sent as the 'ps' query parameter.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
